{{Missing Info|specifics=Robot amounts past 90}}

== Demon God Device ==
Demon God Device Cabin within [[Rocket]] Cabins

Send robots to gather: {{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell}}<br>
Upgrade Demon God Cabin Tech to send more robots.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tech
!Robots
|-
|0-399||5
|-
|400-1,399||10
|-
|1,400-3,199||20
|-
|3,200-5,999||30
|-
|6,000-10,799||40
|-
|10,800-17,999||50
|-
|18,000-24,999||60
|-
|25,000-35,999||70
|-
|36,000-53,999||80
|-
|54,000-79,999||90
|-
|80,000-?||?
|}

==Particle Accelerator==
Each tier gives +1 to Demon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Wind DMG +20.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T1 Demon God Gear x40<br>T1 Demon God Chip x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x10K
|[[File:Time-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Time Chest +100
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T2 Demon God Gear x40<br>T2 Demon God Chip x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x20K
|[[File:Time-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Time Chest +200
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T3 Demon God Gear x40<br>T3 Demon God Chip x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x30K
|[[File:Time-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Time Chest +400
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T4 Demon God Gear x40<br>T4 Demon God Chip x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x40K
|[[File:Time-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Time Chest +800
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T5 Demon God Gear x40<br>T5 Demon God Chip x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x50K
|[[File:Time-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Time Chest +1,600
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|}

==Assist System==
Each tier gives +1 to Dragon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Fire DMG +20.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T1 Demon God Gear x40<br>T1 Demon God Prism x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x10K
|[[File:Gene-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gene Speedup +4h
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T2 Demon God Gear x40<br>T2 Demon God Prism x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x20K
|[[File:Gene-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gene Speedup +8h
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T3 Demon God Gear x40<br>T3 Demon God Prism x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x30K
|[[File:Gene-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gene Speedup +16h
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T4 Demon God Gear x40<br>T4 Demon God Prism x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x40K
|[[File:Gene-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gene Speedup +1d 8h
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T5 Demon God Gear x40<br>T5 Demon God Prism x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x50K
|[[File:Gene-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gene Speedup +2d
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x300
|}

==Orbit Assimilator==
Each tier gives +1 to Mecha Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Earth DMG +20.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T1 Demon God Chip x40<br>T1 Demon God Prism<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x10K
|[[File:Refine-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Refine Speedup +4h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T2 Demon God Chip x40<br>T2 Demon God Prism<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x20K
|[[File:Refine-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Refine Speedup +8h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T3 Demon God Chip x40<br>T3 Demon God Prism<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x30K
|[[File:Refine-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Refine Speedup +16h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T4 Demon God Chip x40<br>T4 Demon God Prism<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x40K
|[[File:Refine-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Refine Speedup +1d 8h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T5 Demon God Chip x40<br>T5 Demon God Prism<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x50K
|[[File:Refine-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Refine Speedup +2d
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|}

==Gravity Propeller==
Each tier gives +1 to Mutant Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Water DMG +20.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|40 T1 Demon God Propeller<br>40 T1 Demon God Chip<br>40 T1 Demon God Prism<br>10k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Military Printing Supply, +30}}
|-
|2
|40 T2 Demon God Propeller<br>40 T2 Demon God Chip<br>40 T2 Demon God Prism<br>20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +200}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Military Printing Supply, +60}}
|-
|3
|40 T3 Demon God Propeller<br>40 T3 Demon God Chip<br>40 T3 Demon God Prism<br>30k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +400}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Military Printing Supply, +120}}
|-
|4
|40 T4 Demon God Propeller<br>40 T4 Demon God Chip<br>40 T4 Demon God Prism<br>40k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +800}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Military Printing Supply, +200}}
|-
|5
|40 T5 Demon God Propeller<br>40 T5 Demon God Chip<br>40 T5 Demon God Prism<br>50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +1.6k}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Military Printing Supply, +300}}
|}

==Demon God Matrix==
Each tier gives +2 to Demon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Fire DMG +2%.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Fire RES +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T1 Demon God Gear x40<br>T1 Demon God Engine x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x20K
|[[File:Demon-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Demon Chest +150
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x50
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T2 Demon God Gear x40<br>T2 Demon God Engine x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x40K
|[[File:Demon-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Demon Chest +300
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x100
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T3 Demon God Gear x40<br>T3 Demon God Engine x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x60K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Matrix Beast|blue|Nursery#Minion_Skins}} (Nightmare Steed Skin)
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T4 Demon God Gear x40<br>T4 Demon God Engine x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x80K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Spine|purple}} +10
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x320
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Bearing x40<br>T5 Demon God Gear x40<br>T5 Demon God Engine x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x100K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Spine|purple}} +20
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x500
|}

==Curvature Engine==
Each tier gives +2 to {{RewardIcon|Dragon Form Icon}}Dragon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Wind DMG +2%.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Wind RES +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|40 T1 Demon God Chip<br>40 T1 Demon God Prism<br>5 T1 Demon God Engine<br>20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Neutral Chest, +150|green}}
|50 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|2
|40 T2 Demon God Chip<br>40 T2 Demon God Prism<br>5 T2 Demon God Engine x5<br>40k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Neutral Chest, +300|green}}
|100 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|3
|40 T3 Demon God Chip<br>40 T3 Demon God Prism<br>5 T3 Demon God Engine x5<br>60k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Warp Dragon|blue|Nursery#Minion_Skins}} (Drawn Dragon Skin)
|200 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|4
|40 T4 Demon God Chip<br>40 T4 Demon God Prism<br>5 T4 Demon God Engine x5<br>80k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Warp Horn|purple}} +10
|320 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|5
|40 T5 Demon God Chip<br>40 T5 Demon God Prism<br>5 T5 Demon God Engine<br>100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Warp Horn|purple}} +20
|500 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|}

==Apocalypse Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives In any Realm, Demon God Cells gained +4%.<br>Each tier gives All Minion ATK +2%.<br>Each tier gives All Minion RUSH +2%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Bearing x200<br>T1 Demon God Chip x200<br>T1 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x30K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Misfortune Star|green}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Bearing x200<br>T2 Demon God Chip x200<br>T2 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x60K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mahakala's Offering|orange|Altar#Offerings and Divine Chests}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Bearing x200<br>T3 Demon God Chip x200<br>T3 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x90K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Bearing x200<br>T4 Demon God Chip x200<br>T4 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x120K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Blood of Cain|orange}} +40
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Bearing x200<br>T5 Demon God Chip x200<br>T5 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x150K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Blood of Cain|orange}} +240
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Eternal Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives In any Realm, Cells collected +2%.<br>Each tier gives Home Facility Resource Outputs +2%.<br>Each tier gives Home Facility Resource Max Cap +2%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Demon God Gear x200<br>T1 Demon God Prism x200<br>T1 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x30K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|St. George's Gold Cup|green}}
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Demon God Gear x200<br>T2 Demon God Prism x200<br>T2 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x60K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb, +1|orange}}
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Demon God Gear x200<br>T3 Demon God Prism x200<br>T3 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x90K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Demon God Gear x200<br>T4 Demon God Prism x200<br>T4 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x120K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Arkanrock|orange}} +40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Demon God Gear x200<br>T5 Demon God Prism x200<br>T5 Demon God Engine x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tad x150K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Arkanrock|orange}} +240
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Links to Other Cabins==

* Cabin: [[Domain Device]]
* Cabin: [[Species Device]]
* Cabin: [[Rebel Device]]
* Cabin: [[Earth's Will Device]]

[[Category:Rocket]]
